ThreeWayMatching.title: 3-Way Matching
ThreeWayMatching.description: Control variance between Purchase Orders, Goods Receipts, and Vendor Invoices

ruleAlert.title: 3-Way Matching Principle
ruleAlert.description: Payment validity: (1) PO Quantity = Actual Received Quantity (GRN) and (2) PO Unit Price = Vendor Invoice Unit Price.

detail.missingInvoiceDescription: This PO has a GRN but no vendor invoice yet. Create the Vendor Invoice from Purchase Orders before payment matching.

readAll.title: View all modules
readAll.description: Allows reading dashboards, lists, and detail screens across the system.

manageAll.title: Full system administration
manageAll.description: Allows configuring users, roles, and all operational modules.

readAccounting.title: View accounting data
readAccounting.description: Allows viewing journals, ledgers, tax reports, receivables, and payables.

writeAccounting.title: Create and update accounting data
writeAccounting.description: Allows posting accounting entries, updating payment records, and managing period workflows.

readExportDocument.title: View export documents
readExportDocument.description: Allows viewing commercial invoices, export document sets, and related shipment paperwork.

writeExportDocument.title: Create and update export documents
writeExportDocument.description: Allows issuing, editing, and cancelling export documentation.

readSalesContract.title: View sales contracts

writeSalesContract.title: Create and update sales contracts
writeSalesContract.description: Allows creating, editing, and progressing export sales contracts.

readCostPrice.title: View cost price
readCostPrice.description: Allows seeing purchase cost and cost price indicators.

readCostFields.title: View cost-sensitive fields
readCostFields.description: Allows viewing margin, valuation, and cost fields that are hidden from regular users.

writeCostFields.title: Enter cost-sensitive fields
writeCostFields.description: Allows creating cost, valuation, and margin-related values.

updateCostFields.title: Adjust cost-sensitive fields
updateCostFields.description: Allows updating cost values after review.

manageCostFields.title: Manage all cost controls
manageCostFields.description: Allows full control over protected cost and margin fields.

readBankFields.title: View bank information
readBankFields.description: Allows viewing bank account and transfer details.

readPaymentFields.title: View payment information
readPaymentFields.description: Allows viewing payment schedule, payment evidence, and settlement details.

manageBankFields.title: Manage bank information
manageBankFields.description: Allows updating protected bank account and transfer details.

readTradeFinance.title: View trade finance
readTradeFinance.description: Allows viewing L/C, D/P, D/A, and T/T finance information.

manageTradeFinance.title: Manage trade finance
manageTradeFinance.description: Allows creating and updating L/C, collections, and international payment workflows.

readLcSensitive.title: View sensitive L/C terms
readLcSensitive.description: Allows viewing protected Letter of Credit terms and discrepancy information.

InventoryCounts.title: Stock Count & Valuation
InventoryCounts.description: Create stock counts, approve variances before ledger posting, and view FIFO/AVG valuation

messages.createSuccess: Stock count created from current inventory
messages.approveSuccess: Stock count approved and variance posted

FIFO.title: FIFO - first in, first out
FIFO.description: Values inventory from the remaining cost layers after consuming the oldest received lots first. Useful when costs need to follow lot flow.

AVG.title: AVG - weighted average
AVG.description: Values inventory using the weighted average unit cost of remaining stock. Useful when you want to smooth price changes across lots.

valuation.sameResultTitle: FIFO and AVG currently produce the same result
valuation.sameResultDescription: This is normal when remaining lots have the same unit cost, only one cost layer remains, or older data has no lot-level cost difference.
